theme: satellites racing to downlink imagery through few ground stations
title: Downlink Rush: Periodic Ground-Station Phasing
strategies: single-best-station reproduction: every satellite only ever uses the highest-drain station's window, every orbit (the checker's own baseline)

greedy opportunism: every satellite transmits during every window it has to every station, every orbit, with no coordination -- piles satellites onto the best station and triggers co-channel quartering plus buffer overflow

periodic phase coloring: bucket satellites by orbital phase, round-robin contending satellites across distinct stations (or time-slice a shared station window into non-overlapping full-rate sub-slots) once on the periodic quotient, then replicate the same conflict-free assignment across every orbit
